questions: I believe in respecting people's choices and asking for what I need directly. My adult child calls to say they've decided to spend the holidays abroad with friends instead of coming home. How do I respond?
I believe in respecting people's choices and asking for what I need directly. My closest friend declines to attend my milestone birthday party because they have a prior commitment. What do I say?

I believe in respecting people's choices and asking for what I need directly. My partner tells me they want to spend the weekend at a retreat alone instead of going to a family event I'd invited them to. How do I handle it?

I believe in respecting people's choices and asking for what I need directly. A sibling says they can't help me care for our elderly parent this month because they're dealing with their own stressful situation. What do I tell them?

I believe in respecting people's choices and asking for what I need directly. A longtime friend says they won't be able to be in my wedding party because they can't afford the travel. How do I respond?
I believe in respecting people's choices and asking for what I need directly. My colleague declines to stay late to help with a project even though I covered for them last quarter. What do I say?

I believe in respecting people's choices and asking for what I need directly. My grown child tells me they've decided to move to another country for a job opportunity and won't be nearby anymore. How do I respond?

I believe in respecting people's choices and asking for what I need directly. A neighbor I've helped out many times says they can't return the favor right now when I ask for help moving furniture. What do I tell them?

I believe in respecting people's choices and asking for what I need directly. My best friend says they're going on vacation the week of my surgery and won't be around to help me recover. How do I handle the conversation?

I believe in respecting people's choices and asking for what I need directly. My sibling chooses to spend a significant inheritance on travel rather than contributing to a family expense I'd hoped they'd share. What do I say?
